about.p1: Computer Science student with technical training in Computer Maintenance and Support, passionate about technology and development of intelligent solutions. I have knowledge in assembly and maintenance of computers, networks, operating systems and technical support. I also work as a programmer, with experience in languages such as JavaScript, Python and HTML/CSS, as well as notions in databases and web development. I constantly seek to improve my skills and I am always open to new challenges, focusing on professional growth and contribution to innovative projects in the IT area.
about.p2: Enthusiast of Information Technology and Computer Maintenance, knowledge in structured cabling, Computer Network and CCTV, Programming, as well as knowledge and projects in Arduino
